notes: Phase 2 de-bloat (Search & Destroy) — dead-code + scope removal, no feature changes. (1) Removed orphaned cosmic-* button CSS/JS (.cosmic-wrap/.cosmic-canvas/.cosmic-border-glow/.cosmic-btn, CosmicButton class, initCosmicButtons, and the _cosmicObserver MutationObserver that was re-scanning the entire DOM subtree on every mutation for elements that no longer exist) — all dead since the v1.6.43 ENTER-circle swap. @keyframes cosmic-rotate and @property --border-angle are preserved (still used by the live ENTER circle). Removed the dead BOOT TOPOLOGIES block (bootRenderTopologies + bootTopoOpen + auto-render IIFE) that updated topology tiles removed in v1.6.43. Removed the orphaned OPS_TABS.site delegate (no call sites after v1.6.46) and its two dead .stab[data-tab=site] CSS rules. (2) Fixed two broken routes: showPage('ops',...) -> showPage('sop',...) in the omni-search rack-name and SOP-title handlers (pg-ops never existed). (3) Utility dedup: collapsed three duplicate HTML escapers (_bp_escape, _bomIngest_esc, _bomLookup_esc) into thin delegators over the single escHtml implementation, each preserving its exact null-handling contract (the two BOM escapers now also escape apostrophes -> ', which renders identically); collapsed deploy_formatDate (byte-identical) into formatDate across 9 call sites. (4) Renamed the misleadingly-named phantom_testParseMaster -> master_loadFromPicker (it is load-bearing in the real master-load flow, not a test harness). (5) Scope cut: removed the Arista EOS, Cisco NX-OS, and Mellanox switch-CLI subtabs from pg-cli (general network engineering, out of rack-and-stack scope); retained Console, OOB, Test & Cert, Parser, and IB/NDR. Realigned the cli-sub default to cs-ib, the panel-id registry, and the omni-search nth-child selectors for OOB/Console. Net: 485 lines removed. Verification: JS parse OK (node --check), CSS braces balanced 2352/2352, HTML div nesting preserved.
